gist.headline: Speaking your language
gist.blurb: TranslateIt has joined the community greenhouse! This clever new app uses AI to translate text based on sentence context, making sure your true meaning never gets lost in translation.
gist.summary: Added TranslateIt, a context-aware AI translation tool, to the community apps showcase under the writing category.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use TranslateIt to generate more accurate, context-based translations directly from the community showcase.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a translator or scholar. Key symbols: books, speech bubbles with different characters/languages, a cozy study environment. Represents the 'TranslateIt' app addition.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, sitting at a wooden desk surrounded by glowing books and floating speech bubbles with different language symbols. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
